info.title: HM Backend API
info.description: Production API documentation generated from the Express route inventory.

get.description: Health check. Controller: server.js. Authentication: Public. Returns server liveness only.

post.description: Register user. Controller: authController.registerUser. Authentication: Public.
Login user. Controller: authController.loginUser. Authentication: Public.

get.description: Get current user. Controller: authController.getMe. Authentication: Bearer.
List books. Controller: bookController.getBooks. Authentication: Public.
Get book by slug. Controller: bookController.getBookBySlug. Authentication: Public.
Get related books. Controller: bookController.getRelatedBooks. Authentication: Public.
Get book reviews. Controller: bookController.getBookReviews. Authentication: Public.
Search books. Controller: bookController.searchBooks. Authentication: Public.

post.summary: Create order with payment, inventory, QR bridge
post.description: Create order with payment, inventory, QR bridge. Controller: orderController.createOrder. Authentication: Bearer.

put.description: Verify order payment reference. Controller: orderController.verifyPayment. Authentication: Bearer.

delete.description: Cancel order. Controller: orderController.cancelOrder. Authentication: Bearer.

get.description: Get order shipment. Controller: orderShipmentController.getOrderShipment. Authentication: Bearer.
Get order tracking. Controller: orderShipmentController.getOrderTracking. Authentication: Bearer.
Track order by order number. Controller: orderController.trackOrder. Authentication: Public.

post.description: Upload image. Controller: uploadController.uploadImage. Authentication: Bearer.
Upload document. Controller: uploadController.uploadDocument. Authentication: Bearer.

get.description: Get user stats. Controller: userController.getUserStats. Authentication: Bearer.

put.description: Update user profile. Controller: userController.updateUserProfile. Authentication: Bearer.

get.description: Get user orders. Controller: userController.getUserOrders. Authentication: Bearer.
Get user wishlist. Controller: userController.getUserWishlist. Authentication: Bearer.

post.description: Add book to wishlist. Controller: userController.addToWishlist. Authentication: Bearer.

get.description: Get user library. Controller: userController.getUserLibrary. Authentication: Bearer.

delete.description: Remove book from wishlist. Controller: userController.removeFromWishlist. Authentication: Bearer.

get.description: List authors. Controller: authorController.getAuthors. Authentication: Public.
Get author. Controller: authorController.getAuthorById. Authentication: Public.
Get author books. Controller: authorController.getAuthorBooks. Authentication: Public.
Get author stats. Controller: authorController.getAuthorStats. Authentication: Bearer.
Get author analytics alias. Controller: authorController.getAuthorStats. Authentication: Bearer.
Get author royalty history. Controller: authorController.getAuthorRoyaltiesHistory. Authentication: Bearer.

post.description: Create publish request. Controller: publishController.createPublishRequest. Authentication: Author/Admin.

get.description: List publish packages. Controller: publishController.getPublishPackages. Authentication: Public.
Admin analytics summary. Controller: adminController.getAdminAnalytics. Authentication: Admin.
Admin stats alias. Controller: adminController.getAdminAnalytics. Authentication: Admin.
List orders. Controller: adminController.getOrders. Authentication: Admin.

put.description: Update order status. Controller: adminController.updateOrderStatus. Authentication: Admin.

get.description: List publish requests. Controller: adminController.getPublishRequests. Authentication: Admin.

put.description: Update publish request status. Controller: adminController.updatePublishRequestStatus. Authentication: Admin.

post.description: Create book. Controller: adminController.createBook. Authentication: Admin.

put.description: Update book. Controller: adminController.updateBook. Authentication: Admin.

delete.description: Delete book. Controller: adminController.deleteBook. Authentication: Admin.

get.description: Operations dashboard. Controller: adminOperationsController.dashboardSummary. Authentication: Admin.
Global operations search. Controller: adminOperationsController.globalSearch. Authentication: Admin.
List payments. Controller: adminOperationsController.listPayments. Authentication: Admin.
Payment detail. Controller: adminOperationsController.getPaymentDetail. Authentication: Admin.

post.description: Approve payment. Controller: adminOperationsController.approvePayment. Authentication: Admin.
Reject payment. Controller: adminOperationsController.rejectPayment. Authentication: Admin.
Cancel payment intent. Controller: adminOperationsController.cancelPaymentIntent. Authentication: Admin.
Expire payment intent. Controller: adminOperationsController.expirePayment. Authentication: Admin.
Retry payment verification. Controller: adminOperationsController.retryVerification. Authentication: Admin.
Recreate payment QR. Controller: adminOperationsController.recreateQR. Authentication: Admin.

get.description: List inventory reservations. Controller: adminOperationsController.listReservations. Authentication: Admin.
List low stock books. Controller: adminOperationsController.listLowStock. Authentication: Admin.
List payment ledger. Controller: adminOperationsController.listPaymentLedger. Authentication: Admin.
List inventory ledger. Controller: adminOperationsController.listInventoryLedger. Authentication: Admin.
Combined ledger timeline. Controller: adminOperationsController.combinedTimeline. Authentication: Admin.
Search invoices. Controller: adminInvoiceController.searchInvoices. Authentication: Admin.
List invoices. Controller: adminInvoiceController.listInvoices. Authentication: Admin.
Download invoice document. Controller: adminInvoiceController.downloadInvoice. Authentication: Admin.
Get invoice. Controller: adminInvoiceController.getInvoice. Authentication: Admin.
Search notifications. Controller: adminNotificationController.searchNotifications. Authentication: Admin.
List notifications. Controller: adminNotificationController.listNotifications. Authentication: Admin.
Get notification. Controller: adminNotificationController.getNotification. Authentication: Admin.

post.description: Retry failed notification. Controller: adminNotificationController.retryNotification. Authentication: Admin.

get.description: Search shipments. Controller: adminShipmentController.searchShipments. Authentication: Admin.
List shipments. Controller: adminShipmentController.listShipments. Authentication: Admin.
Get shipment tracking. Controller: adminShipmentController.getTracking. Authentication: Admin.
Get shipment. Controller: adminShipmentController.getShipment. Authentication: Admin.

post.description: Assign courier. Controller: adminShipmentController.assignCourier. Authentication: Admin.
Update shipment status. Controller: adminShipmentController.updateStatus. Authentication: Admin.
Cancel shipment. Controller: adminShipmentController.cancelShipment. Authentication: Admin.

get.description: Analytics dashboard. Controller: adminAnalyticsController.dashboard. Authentication: Admin.
Revenue report. Controller: adminAnalyticsController.revenue. Authentication: Admin.
Book sales report. Controller: adminAnalyticsController.books. Authentication: Admin.
Payment metrics. Controller: adminAnalyticsController.payments. Authentication: Admin.
Inventory metrics. Controller: adminAnalyticsController.inventory. Authentication: Admin.
Shipment metrics. Controller: adminAnalyticsController.shipments. Authentication: Admin.
Customer metrics. Controller: adminAnalyticsController.customers. Authentication: Admin.

BadRequest.description: Invalid input or business rule failure.

Forbidden.description: Authenticated user does not have the required role.

PaymentIntentCreated.description: A payment intent was created for an order.

QRCodeGenerated.description: A dynamic QR was generated or regenerated for an active payment intent.

PaymentSubmitted.description: A customer submitted a manual payment reference.

PaymentVerified.description: An authorized actor verified a payment.

PaymentRejected.description: An authorized actor rejected a payment.

OrderCreated.description: An order was created with payment and inventory orchestration.

OrderCancelled.description: An order cancellation released runtime resources.

InventoryDeducted.description: Reserved inventory was converted to stock deduction.

LedgerCreated.description: An immutable ledger entry was written.

AdminApprovedPayment.description: An admin approved a payment through operations tooling.

AdminRejectedPayment.description: An admin rejected a payment through operations tooling.

AdminCancelledPayment.description: An admin cancelled a payment intent.

AdminExpiredPayment.description: An admin expired a payment intent.

AdminRecreatedQR.description: An admin regenerated a payment QR.

InvoiceGenerated.description: An official invoice was generated for a verified payment.

ShipmentCreated.description: A shipment was created for a paid and invoiced order.

CourierAssigned.description: A courier was assigned to a shipment.

ShipmentDispatched.description: A shipment entered dispatch or transit.

ShipmentCancelled.description: A shipment was cancelled before dispatch completion.
